metadata.description: Systematic research ladder for Claude Code (L0→L5) — Firecrawl + Tavily (search + research with --output-schema) + Exa + optional Codex CLI cross-model channel. Plus /osint-research for entity recon.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Six composable research skills: /quick-research (L0, ~10-15 sec, Fireplexity-pattern), /research (L1, ~5 min, search-with-scrape one-shot), /deep-research (L2, ~12 min, 4 verification checkpoints + Tavily Research Answer Channel), /expert-research (L3, ~20 min, schema-based fact-check via Tavily Research --output-schema), /academic-research (L4, ~40 min, arXiv + full agent crew + FC categories:research), /ultra-research (L5, 1+ hour, full knowledge vault). Plus /osint-research (entity recon). Each tier composes on the previous one. Includes shared verification library for audit-trail integrity.
